pi_items.source: setup_task.sh downloads from https://www.astro.louisville.edu/software/astroimagej/examples/WASP-12b_example_calibrated_images.tar.gz and extracts the dataset
setup_task.sh creates this directory as OUTPUT_DIR and description requires output here

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real telescope observation data for WASP-12b, obtained from the University of Louisville AstroImageJ examples. The setup script correctly extracts exactly 20 FITS frames and prepares the required output directory /home/ga/AstroImages/transient_search/output. A python script calculates the ground truth maximum transient isolated value mathematically as 64367.5 based on the subset.
